dependencies.relationship: Uses CLI infrastructure: loadConfig, newClient, handleError, printJSON, warnf, Cobra root command registration
All commands delegate to Go SDK admin client methods and use SDK types for request/response shapes

task_groups.title: Write tests for admin command tree structure and common execution pattern

subtasks.title: Write tests for NewAdminCmd tree structure (REQ-1.1 – REQ-1.6)
details: Create internal/cli/admin_test.go with TestNewAdminCmdStructure verifying Use='admin', RunE==nil, HasSubCommands()==true.
Test newAdminUsersCmd() returns exactly {list,show,create,update,promote,demote,block,unblock}.
Test newAdminOrgsCmd() returns {list,create,update,delete,block,unblock,members}; members subtree has {list,add,remove}.
Test newAdminKeysCmd() and newAdminTokensCmd() each return exactly {list,revoke}.
Assert that only NewAdminCmd is exported from internal/cli/admin*.go files (unexported others).

subtasks.title: Write tests for common execution pattern: success, APIError, network error, loadConfig failure (REQ-2.1 – REQ-2.4)
details: In admin_users_test.go define adminUsersClient interface covering all user SDK methods.
Write TestCommonSuccessPattern: mock ListUsers returns users, verify printJSON called and exit code 0.
Write TestCommonAPIError: mock GetUserByID returns *apikit.APIError{Code:403}, verify stdout JSON error envelope and exit code 1.
Write TestCommonNetworkError: mock ListUsers returns plain error, verify code-0 envelope on stdout and exit code 2.
Write TestCommonLoadConfigError: loadConfig stub returns error, verify code-0 envelope and exit code 2 without SDK call.

subtasks.title: Write tests for context.Background() usage and no direct HTTP calls (REQ-2.5, REQ-2.6)
details: Write TestContextIsBackground: capturing mock records ctx arg; assert ctx.Deadline() returns hasDeadline==false.
Write TestNoDirectHTTPImports as a static analysis test: parse import graphs of internal/cli/admin*.go files and assert 'net/http' is absent.
This test can use go/packages or a simple grep-based approach via os/exec in the test file.

subtasks.title: Write tests for argument and flag validation (REQ-3.1 – REQ-3.5)
details: Write TestMissingPositionalArg: invoke 'admin users show' with no args, assert exit code 2 and JSON error envelope {code:0, message:'missing required argument: id'}.
Write TestMissingRequiredFlag: invoke 'admin users create' without --username, assert exit code 2 and JSON error envelope for --username.
Write TestExtraArgsRejected: invoke 'admin users show id1 id2', assert Cobra rejects before RunE via ExactArgs(1).
Write TestNonUUIDPassthrough: invoke 'admin users show not-a-uuid' with mock returning 404, assert mock.CapturedID=='not-a-uuid' and exit code 1.
Write TestEmptyStringFlagPassthrough: invoke create with --username '' and verify CreateUser is called with Username==''.

subtasks.title: Write tests for admin users list and show commands (REQ-4, REQ-5)
details: Write TestAdminUsersListCommand: default invocation, assert ListUsers called with IncludeBlocked:false, stdout is JSON array, exit 0.
Write TestAdminUsersListIncludeBlocked: --include-blocked flag, assert IncludeBlocked:true.
Write TestAdminUsersListAgentInterface: run help --json, assert entry has method=GET, path=/users, auth=admin, flag include-blocked bool default false.
Write TestAdminUsersShowCommand: mock returns User{ID:'u1'}, assert GetUserByID called with 'u1', stdout is user JSON, exit 0.
Write TestAdminUsersShowMissingID: no args, assert exit code 2, message 'missing required argument: id'.
Write TestAdminUsersShowAgentInterface: assert method=GET, path=/users/:id, auth=admin.

subtasks.title: Write tests for admin users create command (REQ-6)
details: Write TestAdminUsersCreateCommand: all four flags provided, assert CreateUser called with correct struct fields, stdout is user JSON, exit 0.
Write TestAdminUsersCreateAgentInterface: assert method=POST, path=/users, auth=admin, four flags all required.
Write TestAdminUsersCreateMissingUsername: assert exit 2 and message 'missing required flag: --username'.
Write TestAdminUsersCreateMissingEmail: assert exit 2 and message 'missing required flag: --email'.
Write TestAdminUsersCreateMissingProvider: assert exit 2 and message 'missing required flag: --provider'.
Write TestAdminUsersCreateMissingProviderID: assert exit 2 and message 'missing required flag: --provider-id'.

checks: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestNewAdminCmd|TestCommon|TestContext|TestNoDirectHTTP|TestMissing|TestExtraArgs|TestNonUUID|TestEmptyString|TestAdminUsersList|TestAdminUsersShow|TestAdminUsersCreate' compiles and all referenced tests are present (may fail with 'not implemented' stubs at this stage)
go vet ./internal/cli/... reports no errors
Test files admin_test.go and admin_users_test.go exist under internal/cli/
All test-scoped interfaces (adminUsersClient etc.) are unexported and defined only in _test.go files
Requirements 14-REQ-1.1 through 14-REQ-6.2 are referenced in at least one test_spec_refs entry

task_groups.title: Write tests for admin users update/promote/demote/block/unblock commands (REQ-7 – REQ-11)

subtasks.title: Write tests for admin users update command (REQ-7)

Write TestAdminUsersUpdateEmptyFullName: --full-name '' is valid; assert UpdateUserByID called with FullName=='', exit 0.
Write TestAdminUsersUpdateAgentInterface: assert method=PATCH, path=/users/:id, auth=admin, args=[id], flags=[full-name required].
Write TestAdminUsersUpdateMissingID: no positional arg, assert exit 2 and message 'missing required argument: id'.
Write TestAdminUsersUpdateMissingFullName: flag absent entirely, assert exit 2 and message 'missing required flag: --full-name', SDK not called.

details: Write TestAdminUsersPromoteCommand: assert PromoteUser called with id, stdout is user JSON, exit 0.

Write TestAdminUsersPromoteMissingID: assert exit 2.
Write TestAdminUsersDemoteCommand: assert DemoteUser called, stdout is user JSON, exit 0 (no client-side last-admin check).
Write TestAdminUsersDemoteAgentInterface: method=POST, path=/users/:id/demote, auth=admin.
Write TestAdminUsersDemoteMissingID: assert exit 2.
Write TestAdminUsersDemoteLastAdmin: mock returns APIError{Code:409, Message:'cannot demote the last admin'}, assert stdout error envelope and exit 1.

details: Write TestAdminUsersBlockCommand: mock BlockUser returns User{Blocked:true}, assert called with id, stdout is user JSON, exit 0.
Write TestAdminUsersBlockAgentInterface: method=POST, path=/users/:id/block, auth=admin.
Write TestAdminUsersBlockMissingID: assert exit 2.
Write TestAdminUsersUnblockCommand: mock UnblockUser returns User{Blocked:false}, assert called, exit 0.
Write TestAdminUsersUnblockAgentInterface: method=POST, path=/users/:id/unblock, auth=admin.
Write TestAdminUsersUnblockMissingID: assert exit 2.

subtasks.title: Write tests for admin users API and network error forwarding (REQ-26)
details: Write TestAdminUsersAPIError403: ListUsers returns APIError{Code:403, Message:'forbidden'}, assert stdout {error:{code:403,message:'forbidden'}}, exit 1.
Write TestAdminUsersAPIError404: GetUserByID returns APIError{Code:404, Message:'user not found'}, assert exit 1 and correct envelope.
Write TestAdminUsersNetworkError: ListUsers returns plain error, assert stdout {error:{code:0,...}}, exit 2.
Write TestExitCodeInvariants: parameterized test verifying exit code is exactly 0, 1, or 2 across success/APIError/networkError scenarios.

checks: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestAdminUsersUpdate|TestAdminUsersPromote|TestAdminUsersDemote|TestAdminUsersBlock|TestAdminUsersUnblock|TestAdminUsersAPIError|TestAdminUsersNetworkError|TestExitCode' compiles without errors

Write TestAdminOrgsUpdateURLOnly: only --url provided, assert req.Name is nil, req.URL is non-nil ptr.

details: Create admin_keys_test.go with adminKeysClient interface; create admin_tokens_test.go with adminTokensClient interface.
Write TestAdminKeysListCommand: ListUserKeys called with userID, stdout is APIKey array (no secret material), exit 0.

subtasks.title: Write tests for JSON output, agent interface, and unit test coverage requirements (REQ-25, REQ-27, REQ-28)
details: Write TestJSONOutputFormatting: verify printJSON uses two-space indented JSON for a user object.
Write TestVoidResponseCommands: parameterized test over all five void-response commands; assert stdout parses as empty object {}.
Write TestWarningsGoToStderr: invoke orgs update with no flags; assert 'no fields specified for update' in stderr only, not stdout.
Write TestAdminCommandsHelpJSON: run help --json, assert all 21 admin commands present with auth=='admin', non-empty method/path/args/flags.
Write TestMockInterfaceUnexported: static check that adminXxxClient interfaces are defined only in _test.go files.
Write TestNoIntegrationTestFiles: assert no file in internal/cli/ matches *integration*.go.

subtasks.title: Write property and edge case tests for cross-cutting invariants (PROP-1 – PROP-7, edge cases)
details: Write TestStdoutAlwaysValidJSON (PROP-1): for a sample of commands in success/error/client-error scenarios, parse stdout as JSON; assert no parse errors.
Write TestExitCodeAlways012 (PROP-2): parameterized over all command+scenario combos, assert exit code in {0,1,2}.
Write TestNoNetHTTPInAdminFiles (PROP-3): static analysis confirming net/http not imported in production admin files.
Write TestSDKNotCalledOnValidationFailure (PROP-4): for each command, omit required arg/flag; assert SDK method call counter remains 0.
Write TestVoidCommandsAlwaysPrintEmpty (PROP-5): for all 5 void commands, assert stdout=='{}' on nil SDK return.
Write TestParentCommandsExitZeroNoConfig (TS-14-E1): invoke 'admin' with no subcommand; assert exit 0, loadConfig not called.
Write TestPrintJSONFailureExits2 (TS-14-E2): stub printJSON to return error; assert exit 2.
Write TestContextNoDeadline (PROP-7): capturing mock asserts ctx.Deadline() has no deadline.

All 7 correctness properties (PROP-1 through PROP-7) have at least one corresponding test

task_groups.title: Implement admin command infrastructure: admin.go, NewAdminCmd, and subcommand scaffolding

subtasks.title: Create internal/cli/admin.go with NewAdminCmd and unexported group constructors
details: Create internal/cli/admin.go defining NewAdminCmd() *cobra.Command with Use='admin', Short description, no RunE.
Wire children: cmd.AddCommand(newAdminUsersCmd(), newAdminOrgsCmd(), newAdminKeysCmd(), newAdminTokensCmd()).
All subcommand constructors (newAdminUsersCmd etc.) are unexported; only NewAdminCmd is exported.
NewAdminCmd is the sole exported symbol from admin*.go files — confirmed by TS-14-6 static check.

subtasks.title: Create internal/cli/admin_users.go scaffold with all user subcommands registered
details: Define newAdminUsersCmd() returning *cobra.Command with Use='users', no RunE.
Add subcommands: list, show, create, update, promote, demote, block, unblock — each with Use, Short, Args (cobra.ExactArgs or cobra.NoArgs), RunE using panic('not implemented') stubs.
Register --include-blocked flag on list; --username, --email, --provider, --provider-id flags on create; --full-name flag on update.
Declare the adminUsersClient interface (unexported) in the production file or prepare injection point for test doubles.
Ensure all eight subcommands are added to the users parent via AddCommand.

subtasks.title: Create internal/cli/admin_orgs.go scaffold with all org subcommands and members group
details: Define newAdminOrgsCmd() and newAdminOrgsMembersCmd() with correct Use values and no RunE on parent commands.
Add org subcommands: list (--include-blocked), create (--name required, --slug required, --url optional), update (--name optional, --url optional), delete, block, unblock — all with panic stub RunE.
Add members subcommands: list (ExactArgs(1)), add (ExactArgs(2)), remove (ExactArgs(2)) — panic stub RunE.
Wire newAdminOrgsMembersCmd() into newAdminOrgsCmd() via AddCommand.

subtasks.title: Create internal/cli/admin_keys.go and admin_tokens.go scaffolds
details: Define newAdminKeysCmd() with subcommands list (ExactArgs(1)) and revoke (ExactArgs(2)), both with panic stub RunE.
Define newAdminTokensCmd() with subcommands list (ExactArgs(1)) and revoke (ExactArgs(2)), both with panic stub RunE.
Each file should import cobra and the apikit package but not net/http.

checks: go build ./internal/cli/... succeeds with no compilation errors
go vet ./internal/cli/... reports no errors
TS-14-1 through TS-14-6 (command tree structure tests) pass: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestNewAdminCmd|TestAdminUsersCmd|TestAdminOrgsCmd|TestAdminKeysCmd|TestAdminTokensCmd'
grep -rn 'net/http' internal/cli/admin*.go returns no matches
All five source files (admin.go, admin_users.go, admin_orgs.go, admin_keys.go, admin_tokens.go) exist under internal/cli/

task_groups.title: Implement admin users list, show, and create command RunE functions

subtasks.title: Implement admin users list RunE: loadConfig, newClient, ListUsers, printJSON
details: Replace panic stub in list RunE: call loadConfig(cmd), handle error via handleError+exit(2).
Call newClient(cfg) to obtain client.
Read --include-blocked flag value; call client.ListUsers(context.Background(), &apikit.ListUsersOptions{IncludeBlocked: includeBlocked}).
On success: printJSON(users); os.Exit(0). On *apikit.APIError: handleError; os.Exit(1). On other error: handleError; os.Exit(2).

subtasks.title: Implement admin users show RunE: GetUserByID, unwrap Response, printJSON
details: Replace panic stub in show RunE: read args[0] as id.
Call client.GetUserByID(context.Background(), id); unwrap Response[User].Data field before passing to printJSON.
Handle *apikit.APIError (exit 1) and other errors (exit 2) via handleError.

subtasks.title: Implement admin users create RunE: required flag validation, CreateUser, printJSON
details: Replace panic stub in create RunE: read --username, --email, --provider, --provider-id flag values.
For each flag: if the flag was not set (use cmd.Flags().Changed(flagName)), print JSON error envelope with 'missing required flag: --<name>' and os.Exit(2).
Call client.CreateUser(context.Background(), &apikit.CreateUserRequest{Username:username, Email:email, Provider:provider, ProviderID:providerID}).
On success: printJSON(user); os.Exit(0). Handle errors per REQ-2.2/2.3.

subtasks.title: Register agent interface metadata for users list, show, create commands (REQ-4.3, REQ-5.2, REQ-6.2)
details: Use the CLI core agent interface registration mechanism (spec 13) to register metadata for 'admin users list' (GET /users, auth:admin, flag:include-blocked).
Register 'admin users show' (GET /users/:id, auth:admin, arg:id).
Register 'admin users create' (POST /users, auth:admin, four required flags).
Ensure method, path, auth, args, and flags fields are populated per REQ-27.2.

checks: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestAdminUsersList|TestAdminUsersShow|TestAdminUsersCreate' — all related tests pass
go vet ./internal/cli/... reports no errors
TS-14-18, TS-14-19, TS-14-21, TS-14-23 pass: ListUsers/GetUserByID/CreateUser called with correct params, stdout is valid JSON, exit code 0
TS-14-E5 through TS-14-E8 pass: missing flags produce exit code 2 and JSON error envelopes
TS-14-20, TS-14-22, TS-14-24 pass: agent interface entries correct for list/show/create
Requirements 14-REQ-4.1, 14-REQ-5.1, 14-REQ-6.1 acceptance criteria confirmed

task_groups.title: Implement admin users update, promote, demote, block, unblock command RunE functions

subtasks.title: Implement admin users update RunE: required --full-name flag validation, UpdateUserByID
details: Replace panic stub in update RunE: read args[0] as id.
Check cmd.Flags().Changed('full-name'); if not set, print JSON error envelope 'missing required flag: --full-name' and os.Exit(2).
An empty string (--full-name '') is valid: pass through to UpdateUserByID with FullName=''.
Call client.UpdateUserByID(context.Background(), id, &apikit.UpdateUserRequest{FullName: fullName}). Handle errors per standard pattern.

subtasks.title: Implement admin users promote and demote RunE functions
details: Implement promote RunE: read args[0] as id, call client.PromoteUser(context.Background(), id), printJSON on success.
Implement demote RunE: read args[0] as id, call client.DemoteUser(context.Background(), id), printJSON on success.
No client-side last-admin safeguard — server enforces this and returns APIError{Code:409} which CLI forwards as exit 1.

subtasks.title: Implement admin users block and unblock RunE functions
details: Implement block RunE: read args[0] as id, call client.BlockUser(context.Background(), id), printJSON on success.
Implement unblock RunE: read args[0] as id, call client.UnblockUser(context.Background(), id), printJSON on success.
Both commands use the standard error pattern (APIError→exit 1, other→exit 2).

subtasks.title: Register agent interface metadata for update, promote, demote, block, unblock (REQ-7.3, REQ-8.2, REQ-9.2, REQ-10.2, REQ-11.2)
details: Register 'admin users update' (PATCH /users/:id, auth:admin, arg:id, required flag:full-name).
Register 'admin users promote' (POST /users/:id/promote, auth:admin, arg:id).
Register 'admin users demote' (POST /users/:id/demote, auth:admin, arg:id).
Register 'admin users block' (POST /users/:id/block, auth:admin, arg:id).
Register 'admin users unblock' (POST /users/:id/unblock, auth:admin, arg:id).

checks: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestAdminUsersUpdate|TestAdminUsersPromote|TestAdminUsersDemote|TestAdminUsersBlock|TestAdminUsersUnblock' — all pass
go vet ./internal/cli/... reports no errors
TS-14-25 passes: UpdateUserByID called with correct id and FullName
TS-14-E10 passes: absent --full-name flag yields exit code 2 without SDK call
TS-14-E13 passes: 409 APIError from DemoteUser yields exit code 1 with correct envelope
Requirements 14-REQ-7 through 14-REQ-11 acceptance criteria confirmed

task_groups.title: Implement admin orgs list, create, and update command RunE functions

subtasks.title: Implement admin orgs list RunE: ListOrgs with IncludeBlocked option
details: Replace panic stub in orgs list RunE: read --include-blocked flag.
Call client.ListOrgs(context.Background(), &apikit.ListOrgsOptions{IncludeBlocked: includeBlocked}).
printJSON on success, error pattern for failures.

subtasks.title: Implement admin orgs create RunE: required flag validation, nil URL pointer, CreateOrg
details: Replace panic stub in orgs create RunE: check cmd.Flags().Changed('name') and 'slug'; exit 2 with JSON error envelope if absent.
Build CreateOrgRequest: Name=name, Slug=slug; if cmd.Flags().Changed('url'), set URL=&urlStr, else URL=nil.
Call client.CreateOrg(context.Background(), req). Handle errors per standard pattern.

subtasks.title: Implement admin orgs update RunE: optional pointer flags, empty-patch warnf, UpdateOrg
details: Replace panic stub in orgs update RunE: read args[0] as id.
Build UpdateOrgRequest: set Name=&nameStr if cmd.Flags().Changed('name'), else nil; set URL=&urlStr if Changed('url'), else nil.
If neither flag provided, call warnf('no fields specified for update') to stderr; proceed to call UpdateOrg anyway.
Call client.UpdateOrg(context.Background(), id, req). printJSON on success.

subtasks.title: Register agent interface metadata for orgs list, create, update (REQ-12.3, REQ-13.3, REQ-14.3)
details: Register 'admin orgs list' (GET /orgs, auth:admin, flag:include-blocked bool default false).
Register 'admin orgs create' (POST /orgs, auth:admin, flags: name required, slug required, url optional).
Register 'admin orgs update' (PATCH /orgs/:id, auth:admin, arg:id, flags: name optional, url optional).

task_groups.title: Implement admin orgs delete, block, unblock and members commands

subtasks.title: Implement admin orgs delete, block, unblock RunE functions
details: Implement orgs delete RunE: read args[0] as id, call client.DeleteOrg(context.Background(), id); on nil error call printJSON(struct{}{}) to emit '{}', exit 0.
Implement orgs block RunE: call client.BlockOrg(context.Background(), id); printJSON(org) on success.
Implement orgs unblock RunE: call client.UnblockOrg(context.Background(), id); printJSON(org) on success.

subtasks.title: Implement admin orgs members list, add, remove RunE functions

Implement members add RunE: read args[0]=orgID, args[1]=userID, call client.AddOrgMember(context.Background(), orgID, userID); on nil error printJSON(struct{}{}).
Implement members remove RunE: read args[0]=orgID, args[1]=userID, call client.RemoveOrgMember(context.Background(), orgID, userID); on nil error printJSON(struct{}{}).
All use standard error pattern.

task_groups.title: Implement admin keys and tokens commands

subtasks.title: Implement admin keys list and revoke RunE functions
details: Implement keys list RunE: read args[0] as userID, call client.ListUserKeys(context.Background(), userID), printJSON(keys) — secret material is not included because apikit.APIKey type does not expose it.
Implement keys revoke RunE: read args[0]=userID, args[1]=keyID, call client.RevokeUserKey(context.Background(), userID, keyID); on nil error printJSON(struct{}{}).
Both use standard error pattern.

subtasks.title: Implement admin tokens list and revoke RunE functions
details: Implement tokens list RunE: read args[0] as userID, call client.ListUserTokens(context.Background(), userID), printJSON(tokens) — no secret material.
Implement tokens revoke RunE: read args[0]=userID, args[1]=tokenID, call client.RevokeUserToken(context.Background(), userID, tokenID); on nil error printJSON(struct{}{}).
Both use standard error pattern.

subtasks.title: Register agent interface metadata for all keys and tokens commands
details: Register 'admin keys list' (GET /users/:id/keys, auth:admin, arg:user_id).
Register 'admin keys revoke' (DELETE /users/:id/keys/:key_id, auth:admin, args:[user_id, key_id]).
Register 'admin tokens list' (GET /users/:id/tokens, auth:admin, arg:user_id).
Register 'admin tokens revoke' (DELETE /users/:id/tokens/:token_id, auth:admin, args:[user_id, token_id]).

checks: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestAdminKeysList|TestAdminKeysRevoke|TestAdminTokensList|TestAdminTokensRevoke' — all pass
go vet ./internal/cli/... reports no errors
TS-14-57 passes: ListUserKeys called with correct userID, stdout is JSON array, exit 0
TS-14-63 passes: RevokeUserToken called with correct IDs, stdout=='{}', exit 0
TS-14-58, TS-14-60, TS-14-62, TS-14-64 pass: agent interface entries correct for all key/token commands
Requirements 14-REQ-21 through 14-REQ-24 acceptance criteria confirmed

task_groups.title: Full test suite pass and cross-cutting property verification

subtasks.title: Run the complete admin CLI test suite and confirm all tests pass
details: Run go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -v and verify all named test cases from the PRD Testing Strategy pass.
Confirm all four test files (admin_users_test.go, admin_orgs_test.go, admin_keys_test.go, admin_tokens_test.go) compile and pass.
Confirm mock interfaces are unexported and defined only in _test.go files.
Confirm no integration test file (matching *integration*.go) is present in internal/cli/.

subtasks.title: Verify stdout-always-valid-JSON and exit-code-012 invariants (PROP-1, PROP-2)
details: Run TS-14-P1 property test: for success/APIError/clientError scenarios across all admin commands, assert stdout is always parseable JSON.
Run TS-14-P2 property test: assert exit code is exactly in {0, 1, 2} for all scenario combinations.
Run TS-14-65: verify two-space indented JSON output for admin users show.
Run TS-14-68 and TS-14-69: verify exit code correctness and error envelope structure.

subtasks.title: Verify no direct HTTP calls, SDK-not-called-on-validation-failure, and void-response invariants (PROP-3, PROP-4, PROP-5)
details: Run TS-14-P3: static analysis confirms net/http not imported in any internal/cli/admin*.go production file.
Run TS-14-P4: for each command, omit required arg/flag; assert SDK call counter is zero and exit code is 2.
Run TS-14-P5 and TS-14-66: for all five void-response commands, assert stdout=='{}' and exit code 0 on nil SDK return.

subtasks.title: Verify agent interface completeness: all 21 admin commands with auth=admin (PROP-6, REQ-27)
details: Run TS-14-72: parse akc help --json output; assert all 21 admin commands present with auth=='admin'.
Run TS-14-73: for each admin command entry, assert name, description, method, path are non-empty; flags include name/type/required/default/description.
Run TS-14-P6: enumerate admin command tree recursively and cross-check against help JSON.

checks: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 exits 0 with all tests passing
go vet ./internal/cli/... exits 0 with no errors
go build ./... exits 0 with no compilation errors
All 7 correctness properties (PROP-1 through PROP-7) confirmed passing via their property tests
All 21 admin commands present in akc help --json with auth='admin', correct method, path, args, and flags

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration of admin command tree with CLI core and SDK

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths: verify NewAdminCmd is wired into CLI core root command
details: Confirm that spec 13 (CLI core) calls NewAdminCmd() and registers it on the root Cobra command via rootCmd.AddCommand(NewAdminCmd()).
Verify that invoking 'akc admin users list' reaches the list RunE function — trace: main→rootCmd.Execute()→admin RunE→users RunE→list RunE.
Run TS-14-SMOKE-1: with mocked loadConfig, newClient, and ListUsers; assert loadConfig called once, newClient called once, ListUsers called with IncludeBlocked:false, stdout is JSON array, exit 0.
Run TS-14-SMOKE-7: verify agent discovery flow — help --json contains admin users create entry, then invocation calls CreateUser with correct params.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation: SDK responses flow through printJSON to stdout unchanged
details: Run TS-14-SMOKE-2: GetUserByID returns APIError{Code:404}; confirm handleError receives the error and writes {"error":{"code":404,...}} to stdout; confirm exit code is 1.
Run TS-14-SMOKE-4: DeleteOrg returns nil; confirm printJSON receives struct{}{} and stdout is '{}'; confirm exit code is 0.
Confirm that printJSON uses json.MarshalIndent with two-space indent — inspect output for indentation.
Verify no intermediate layer transforms or drops the SDK response value before printJSON.

subtasks.title: Run all smoke tests with real components and mocked dependencies
details: Run TS-14-SMOKE-3: missing --provider-id; confirm exit 2, JSON error envelope, SDK not called.
Run TS-14-SMOKE-5: orgs update with no flags; confirm warnf warning on stderr, UpdateOrg called with nil fields, stdout is org JSON, exit 0.
Run TS-14-SMOKE-6: ListUserKeys with network error; confirm code-0 envelope on stdout, exit 2.
All 7 SMOKE tests must pass: go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'SMOKE'.

subtasks.title: Stub and dead-code audit: confirm no panic stubs or TODOs remain in production admin files
details: Run: grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' internal/cli/admin*.go — must return no matches.
Run: grep -rn 'TODO' internal/cli/admin*.go — review and resolve any remaining TODOs.
Run: grep -rn 'net/http' internal/cli/admin*.go — must return no matches.
Confirm all five RunE stub bodies have been replaced with real implementations.
Confirm each command file compiles and every exported/unexported function has a non-trivial body.

subtasks.title: Cross-spec entry point verification: confirm spec 13 registration and spec 12 SDK method signatures match
details: Locate the spec 13 CLI core file that calls NewAdminCmd() and confirm rootCmd.AddCommand(NewAdminCmd()) is present in production code (not test code).

Verify that all 21 SDK method calls in admin command RunE functions use the exact method names from spec 12: ListUsers, GetUserByID, CreateUser, UpdateUserByID, PromoteUser, DemoteUser, BlockUser, UnblockUser, ListOrgs, CreateOrg, UpdateOrg, DeleteOrg, BlockOrg, UnblockOrg, ListOrgMembers, AddOrgMember, RemoveOrgMember, ListUserKeys, RevokeUserKey, ListUserTokens, RevokeUserToken.
Run go build ./cmd/akc/... to confirm the binary entry point compiles end-to-end.
Run go test ./... -count=1 to confirm no regressions across the full codebase.

go test ./... -count=1 exits 0 — no regressions across full codebase

go vet ./... exits 0 — no vet errors across entire repo
grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' internal/cli/admin*.go returns no output
grep -rn 'net/http' internal/cli/admin*.go returns no output
NewAdminCmd() registration call present in spec 13 production code (not test code)
